snippet.sync_client:
from seed import SeedApi

client = SeedApi(
    base_url="https://yourhost.com/path/to/api",
)
client.vendor.update_vendor(
    vendor_id="vendor_id",
    name="name",
)
snippet.async_client:
import asyncio

from seed import AsyncSeedApi

client = AsyncSeedApi(
    base_url="https://yourhost.com/path/to/api",
)


async def main() -> None:
    await client.vendor.update_vendor(
        vendor_id="vendor_id",
        name="name",
    )


asyncio.run(main())

import asyncio

from seed import AsyncSeedApi, CreateCatalogImageRequest

client = AsyncSeedApi(
    base_url="https://yourhost.com/path/to/api",
)


async def main() -> None:
    await client.catalog.create_catalog_image(
        request=CreateCatalogImageRequest(
            catalog_object_id="catalog_object_id",
        ),
    )


asyncio.run(main())
